tldr: Escalating conflict between the U.S. and Iran has led to exchanges of missile and drone attacks and a significant drop in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.
Volkswagen has announced plans to cut 50,000 jobs globally, a decision confirmed by CEO Oliver Blume despite the supervisory board rejecting plant closures in Germany.
The European Commission president, Ursula von der Leyen, has pledged an EU-wide social media ban for children under 13, following recommendations from an expert group.

market.why: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite closed higher, with the Nasdaq benefiting from positive tech sector news such as TSMC reporting record June revenue and Meta announcing a $50 billion data center investment in Louisiana.

yield_10y.why: The 10-year Treasury yield saw a slight increase, likely influenced by heightened geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, including a new wave of U.S. strikes against Iran and reduced traffic through the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

vix.why: The VIX, a measure of market volatility expectations, declined, suggesting a decrease in overall market fear, possibly due to the positive closing performance of the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite despite global developments.

tech.summary: Users have reported that the Grok command-line interface (CLI) has uploaded entire user directories to xAI's servers, raising concerns about data privacy.
The European Commission president has committed to an EU-wide ban on social media for children under 13, aligning with calls from an expert panel for age-appropriate restrictions.
Waze is integrating Google's Gemini AI assistant to introduce several new AI-powered features designed to offer users more personalized driving experiences.

world.summary: The United States and Iran have exchanged heavy missile and drone attacks, intensifying their conflict over control of the Strait of Hormuz, which has led to a significant decrease in traffic through the strait.
Volkswagen's chief executive, Oliver Blume, confirmed plans to cut 50,000 jobs as part of a restructuring proposal, despite the supervisory board rejecting the closure of four German factories.

Ukraine is set to present its anti-ballistic program at a meeting in Paris, while Russia has been forced to suspend shipping in the Sea of Azov due to Ukrainian drone attacks on 90 vessels within a week.
